prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-500LLIGHT-FL338-10W Product Type: FLASHLIGHT Brand (from catalog): ASR Tactical Existing Title: Black Compact Multi Mode 500 Lumen LED Flashlight with Wrist Strap, 5.25 Inch Description: ASR Tactical Multi Mode 500 Lumen LED Flashlight may only measure 5.25 inches but, it comes with great and practical built-in features that will make it your go to flashlight-read on.

-5-Stage Switch: easily maneuver between SOS, Strobe, Low, Medium and High light
-Adjustable focus head (zoom in or out between x1, x250, x500, x1000 or x2000)
-500 Lumen brightness
-10W LED bulb
-Glow in the dark on/off button
-Convenient wrist strap
-Patrial texturized handle

Compact, lightweight and easy to handle, this ASR Outdoor multi-mode flashlight is meant to perform for any at home, field or tactical work needs and tasks. The flashlight as mentioned above, comes with a handy wrist strap that allows you to secure the tactical tool to your wrist when employed; the wrist strap also makes it easy to attach to an inner pocket, backpack or work bag via a clip or carabiner for storage or travel when not in use.

Length: 5.25 inches

Batteries: x3 AAA (not included) Search Terms: edc flashlight gear tool survival kit 500 lumen light tactical camping accessories lantern emergency roadside disaster for home car travel gadgets police Features: - 5- STAGE SWITCH TACTICAL FLASHLIGHT: This multi-mode LED tactical flashlight comes with five stages including low, mid, high, SOS and lastly strobe; easily switch between the five modes by engaging the pressure push on/off button at the back of the flashlight - ADJUSTABLE FOCUS HEAD: By simply pushing and pulling the flashlight body in and out, the beam of LED light will be easily adjustable depending on the intended or needed use; zoom in or out between x1, x250, x500, x1000 or x2000; the flashlight also features a texturized grip for easy handling and comfort - GLOW IN THE DARK ON/OFF BUTTON: The ASR Tactical Black Compact Multi Mode 500 Lumen LED flashlight comes with a convenient pressure push on/off button that glows in the dark, allowing you to easily and quickly access the power end of the flashlight - HANDY WRIST STRAP: Featuring a useful and handy wrist strap, secure the compact, LED tactical flashlight around your wrist when in use; when not employed, use the strap to attach to a backpack, inner pocket, work bag and more via carabiner or clip making it easy to locate and store - SPECIFICATIONS: Length: 5.25 inches; Color: Black; Watt: 10W; Lumen: 500; Batteries: x3 AAA required (not included) === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Tactical 5.25in Black Compact 500 Lumen LED Flashlight

openai.item_name: ASR Tactical 5.25 in Black 500 Lumen LED Flashlight

anthropic.title_differentiation: 5-Stage Multi-Mode, Adjustable Focus Zoom, 10W LED, Glow-in-Dark Button, Wrist Strap, Tactical EDC

openai.title_differentiation: 5-Stage Switch, Adjustable Focus Zoom, Glow In Dark Button, Wrist Strap, SOS Strobe, 10W LED, Compact EDC
